summary: Made one surgical exit-continuity edit so Elise's departure from La Sante hands off more cleanly into chapter 18's return to the prison. The opening was already distinct from the adjacent visible opening, and no style-bible example lines appeared verbatim in the chapter.
edits: Adjusted the final sentence to avoid repeating Elise's move from 'outside' to 'the street' and to sharpen the physical exit from the prison wall.
Confirmed the opening paragraph already uses a different scaffold than the adjacent visible chapter opening, so no opening rewrite was needed.
Confirmed no calibration/example lines from the style bible appeared verbatim in the chapter text.
